name: taskflow
description: TaskFlow is a complete full-stack web application designed for smart team task management with role-based access control (Admin & Member). Built from scratch with a clean, professional, modern UI and proper full-stack architecture.

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.build: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix frontend
